title: A New Way to Live
article_text: Our society can accept a new way to live in this current century. We can reduce personal waste by picking up trash from the ground every day. A good leader can fight for a similar change in every street. Some evidence exists that this simple choice can help animals and people. For example, we can contact a former leader to help us complete the plan. We must be patient and never lie about our work. Let's start this fine project now. Technology can help us stay in contact with each other. We can use some new tools to pick up trash faster. I always mention that this is a good idea.

image_prompts: A diverse group of people in a modern city, smiling as they pick up trash from the ground, with a banner saying 'New Way to Live'.
A person holding a trash bag, picking up a piece of paper from the ground in a park, with trees and a clear sky.
A confident leader standing on a street, pointing forward, with people following, and similar houses on both sides.
A scientist holding a clipboard with charts, showing evidence to a group of animals (dog, cat, bird) and people around a table.
A person on a phone, smiling, with a former leader (older person) sitting at a desk, and a plan document on the table.
A person meditating patiently on a cushion, with a clock on the wall showing time, and a speech bubble saying 'No lies'.
A group of people starting a project, holding hands, with a sign that says 'Fine Project' and a bright sun in the background.
Two people using smartphones and a tablet, with connection symbols (WiFi, Bluetooth) floating between them, showing technology.
A person using a long-handled tool to pick up trash in a park, with a speedometer symbol showing 'Faster'.
A person speaking at a podium, with a thought bubble showing a lightbulb and the words 'Good Idea', and a listening audience.
